title: User Management (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola user, grup, dan akun di Windows.

commands.name: net-user
commands.title: net user — Kelola Akun User
commands.description: Mengelola akun user lokal di Windows.
commands.examples:
# List semua user
net user

# Info user
net user Administrator

# Buat user baru
net user john P@ssw0rd /add

# Buat user dengan detail
net user john P@ssw0rd /add /fullname:"John Doe" /comment:"Developer"

# Hapus user
net user john /delete

# Nonaktifkan user
net user john /active:no

# Ganti password
net user john NewP@ss

# PowerShell: Local Users
Get-LocalUser
New-LocalUser -Name "john" -Password (ConvertTo-SecureString "P@ss" -AsPlainText -Force)
Remove-LocalUser -Name "john"

commands.name: net-localgroup
commands.title: net localgroup — Kelola Grup
commands.description: Mengelola grup lokal dan keanggotaan grup di Windows.
commands.examples:
# List semua grup
net localgroup

# Anggota grup Administrators
net localgroup Administrators

# Tambah user ke Administrators
net localgroup Administrators john /add

# Hapus dari grup
net localgroup Administrators john /delete

# Buat grup baru
net localgroup Developers /add

# PowerShell
Get-LocalGroup
Get-LocalGroupMember -Group "Administrators"
Add-LocalGroupMember -Group "Administrators" -Member "john"

commands.name: whoami-win
commands.title: whoami — Identitas User Saat Ini
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi user yang sedang login.
commands.examples:
# Siapa saya
whoami

# User SID
whoami /user

# Grup yang diikuti
whoami /groups

# Privileges
whoami /priv

# Semua info
whoami /all

commands.name: runas
commands.title: runas — Jalankan Sebagai User Lain
commands.description: Menjalankan program dengan kredensial user lain. Setara dengan su/sudo di Linux.
commands.examples:
# Jalankan sebagai admin
runas /user:Administrator cmd

# Jalankan dengan domain user
runas /user:DOMAIN\admin cmd

# Simpan kredensial
runas /user:admin /savecred program.exe

# PowerShell: Run as admin
Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs
Start-Process cmd -Verb RunAs
